programme.title: E13 - Twenty Squad
programme.desc: SWAT faces their deadliest adversary yet when a violent cell of extremists looks to extract vengeance by blowing up half of Los Angeles, potentially killing thousands.

programme.title: E1 - Double Dog Dare
programme.desc: When a murder investigation devolves into a kidnapping, Rex's nose leads him and Charlie to Bell Island - and right into the middle of a double murder plot.

programme.title: E1 - Directed Energy
programme.desc: When a top-secret weapon is stolen in broad daylight from a U.S. defense contractor, CIA agent Colin Glass is paired with FBI agent Bill Goodman to investigate. Their new partnership gets off to a rocky start.

programme.title: Blood Vs. Duty[Live]
programme.desc: Two brothers separated in a maritime tragedy grow up on opposite sides of the law - one a dedicated Intelligence Officer, the other fiercely protective of the Tausug family that raised him. When a corruption case pits them against each other, their long-buried secret threatens to ignite a war between blood and loyalty.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: The Iron Heart
programme.desc: The Iron Heart follows Apollo Adelantar, an undercover operative with a traumatic past who is assigned to infiltrate a powerful crime syndicate. As he goes deeper into his dangerous mission, Apollo is forced to confront painful truths about his identity, loyalty, and family-especially when trusted allies turn into enemies. Fueled by vengeance, justice, and his desire to protect the innocent, Apollo and his companions face relentless trials that test not only their strength but also their moral convictions.

programme.title: E2 - Hunting Priceless Relics
programme.desc: Investigators across Cambodia, Thailand, London and New York are on the hunt for evidence to reclaim ancient artefacts stolen by one of the most infamous art thieves.

programme.title: E1 - Assam
programme.desc: Watch as Varun goes tiger spotting in Manas, visits the famous Kamakhya Temple, and gets introduced to the fine art of tea-tasting.

programme.title: E2 - Meghalaya
programme.desc: Watch the popular Shillong Choir create music, while Varun visits Asia's cleanest village and the Living Roots bridge.

programme.title: E1 - Philippines 1
programme.desc: Awesome backpackers is non-script travel show launched in 2006. It tells the story of two young men traveling all around the world.

programme.title: E2 - Ho Chi Minh City
programme.desc: In Ho Chi Minh City, the most populous hub in Vietnam, Comedian Bill Bailey finds himself caught between wartime tunnels,endless traffic,and the genres of metal and folk.

programme.title: E2 - Beware Of The Bears
programme.desc: Sid and Shanky continue their journey through the rough Himalayan terrain to reach their next destination.

programme.title: Born Wild
programme.desc: Twin brothers Tan and Tide had been fought for the best until Tan died. Tide investigates the death and meets Tan's lover Sandy. Tide finds himself being attracted to her warmth...

programme.title: Mr. Vampire
programme.desc: Mr. Yan calls in Chinese voodoo priest Kou to handle the reburial of his dad. The corpse rises and becomes a vampire. It first kills Mr. Yan and roams about for new victims...

programme.title: E314 - Princess Peppa
programme.desc: Granny and Grandpa Pig come for a dinner party with Mummy and Daddy Pig. Peppa and George are too tired to go to bed, until they are told a story.

programme.title: E106 - Pretend Friend / Croc Outta Water
programme.desc: When Winston won't play with Lydia, Daisy and Mr. Crocodile create an imaginary friend for her. // Mr. Crocodile helps Daisy fish-sit for Martin, but worries he won't be able to stop himself from eating it.

programme.title: E102 - Movie
programme.desc: Tim tries to make his own Captain DinoStar movie.

programme.title: E314 - Princess Peppa
programme.desc: Granny and Grandpa Pig come for a dinner party with Mummy and Daddy Pig. Peppa and George are too tired to go to bed, until they are told a story.

programme.title: E312 - Delphine Donkey
programme.desc: Peppa's French friend Delphine Donkey comes to stay. Peppa takes Delphine to daycare for a visit, where they teach her the 'Bing Bong Song', the class' favorite song to sing.

programme.title: E110 - Double Dare You / Roy
programme.desc: On a ski trip, the Barbapapas build a giant igloo. Barbabravo and Barbalib challenge each other to find out who is braver. // Barbabright creates a vacuuming robot that's also very good at soccer. The Barbababies organise a match against the robots.

programme.title: E311 - The Crew Lifts Up City Hall / The Crew Builds A Rotating Restaurant
programme.desc: A herd of bison are migrating through Builder Cove-right toward City Hall! Rubble & Crew hop in their big vehicles to save the day. // The pups use their mega-sized trucks to help Lucas and Lily give their parents the most awesome anniversary ever.

programme.title: E223 - Buttercup / We Need To Save The Corals
programme.desc: Barbidou's beautiful roses mysteriously disappeared during the night. // Barbapapa decides to tell the barbababies about the time he went to explore the Arctic and the seabed.

programme.title: E212 - The Crew Builds A Ballpark / The Crew Builds A Surf Bridge
programme.desc: When Rubble's favorite baseball star Aaron Judge can't get out of town to the home run derby, Rubble & Crew build a stadium to hold the derby right in Builder Cove! // Surf's up for Rubble & Crew! Well, if they can get over the super hot sand, it is.

programme.title: E102 - Movie
programme.desc: Tim tries to make his own Captain DinoStar movie.

programme.title: E147 - Mister Skinnylegs
programme.desc: George finds a spider in the bathroom sink, but Peppa is really frightened-until she realizes that it doesn't want to hurt her.

programme.title: E110 - Double Dare You / Roy
programme.desc: On a ski trip, the Barbapapas build a giant igloo. Barbabravo and Barbalib challenge each other to find out who is braver. // Barbabright creates a vacuuming robot that's also very good at soccer. The Barbababies organise a match against the robots.

programme.title: E415 - Pups Chill Out / Pups Save Farmer Alex
programme.desc: Roger's frozen food delivery truck gets stuck in a ditch. // Farmer Yumi's animals are stampeding towards town.

programme.title: E616 - Pups Save The Balloon Pups / Pups Save The Spider Spies
programme.desc: Giant balloons floated away from a parade and it's up to the pups to save the pup balloons, the parade and Mayor Humdinger! // The Turbot cousins try to spot a rare spider, but get stuck in its web. It's up to the PAW Patrol save the spider spies!

programme.title: E201 - Explorer / Happy Parky / Storm
programme.desc: Tim explores Rumbleton to find somewhere he can have fun alone. // Tim and Kai try to give Parky the best day ever. // When a storm keeps the Rexes at home they must think of a game to pass the time.

programme.title: E112 - A Guayabera For Tico / Falling Estrella's
programme.desc: Boots gets a Guayabera shirt as a gift for Tico, but becomes attached to it on the way to Tico's house. // Dora, Boots, and Papi want to see the Quetzal constellation dance across the sky, but it loses three stars! Dora has to get them back in time.

programme.title: E325 - Numbers
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends learn how to count by playing games at Madame Gazelle's daycare.

programme.title: E311 - The Crew Lifts Up City Hall / The Crew Builds A Rotating Restaurant
programme.desc: A herd of bison are migrating through Builder Cove-right toward City Hall! Rubble & Crew hop in their big vehicles to save the day. // The pups use their mega-sized trucks to help Lucas and Lily give their parents the most awesome anniversary ever.

programme.title: E102 - Movie
programme.desc: Tim tries to make his own Captain DinoStar movie.

programme.title: E106 - Pretend Friend / Croc Outta Water
programme.desc: When Winston won't play with Lydia, Daisy and Mr. Crocodile create an imaginary friend for her. // Mr. Crocodile helps Daisy fish-sit for Martin, but worries he won't be able to stop himself from eating it.

programme.title: Talk With Claire About Great Bay Area
programme.desc: “Talk With Claire About Great Bay Area” is a bilingual interview program on Shenzhen TV that focuses on in-depth exploration and research. With a global perspective on the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area, it captures cutting-edge trends in economic and trade exchanges, technological innovation, cultural trends, and more between China and the world. Through on-site research and interviews, the program engages in conversations with leaders from government, business, technology, and cultural sectors. It showcases technological achievements, trends in economic and trade exchanges, and mutual learning in civilization exchanges. Since its inception over two years ago, “Talk With Claire About Great Bay Area” has aired more than a hundred episodes of specialized interviews. The program integrates prominent international figures into the Greater Bay Area, where guests draw from their personal experiences living and working in the area or provide professional perspectives o

programme.title: E10 - Chest
programme.desc: Dad tries to teach Bluey how to play chess, but Mum thinks she is still too young. When Bingo joins in, the kids make up their own rules, but they still can't beat Dad.

programme.title: E11 - Sheep Dog
programme.desc: Dad agrees to play Sheepdog with Bluey and Bingo to stop them from disturbing Mum who is taking a well-earned rest, but looking after a sheep is harder work than they expected.

programme.title: E4 - Banana
programme.desc: Banana reveals another secret about herself in the opera piece, 'I've Got a Secret'.

programme.title: E3 - Cabbage
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the marvellous Cabbage.

programme.title: E9 - Super Sandcastle
programme.desc: Supertato and the Veggies have built a super sandcastle, but Evil Pea wants to storm it by firing her hordes of Mini Peas at it with her pea shooter.

programme.title: E103 - Flamenco
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are flamenco dancing! Tinky Winky, Dispy, Laa-Laa and Po are surprisingly good.

programme.title: E1 - Tummy Flutters
programme.desc: It's the OKIDO circus today, and Messy is worried about performing his triple flip. Will his friends be able to help him conquer his tummy flutters before the audience arrives?

programme.title: E14 - Perfect
programme.desc: For her Father's Day card, Bluey sets out to draw a picture of herself and her father together. While recalling her favourite memories of playing with Bandit, Bluey struggles with the idea that her drawing must be perfect. Chilli tries to convince Bluey that perfection isn't easy, or absolutely necessary.

programme.title: E13 - Pass The Parcel
programme.desc: Lucky's Dad is outraged that modern Pass the Parcel has a present in every layer and changes the rules back to only having one prize in the middle, but Bingo is forever losing.

programme.title: E8 - The Monster Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to help Plinky find her scary side. Fortunately, Duggee has his monster badge.

programme.title: E22 - Ping Pong Penguins
programme.desc: What's that bouncy, pingy, whacking sound? It's the Penguins playing ping-pong!

programme.title: E21 - Splash Dash
programme.desc: Duggie chooses a key and his blue digger to dig up a big bone. The chipmunk makes a delivery to the squirrels.

programme.title: E26 - Fairy Tale
programme.desc: Dad tells Bluey and Bingo a real-life fairy tale about growing up in a wild place called the '80s, about a boy who was cursed when he was mean to his little brother.

programme.title: E27 - Musical Statues
programme.desc: At the end of a long day, Bluey and her family are out of sync and out of sorts, so Mum gets everyone to play musical statues.

programme.title: E35 - The Brave Banana Badge
programme.desc: When thunder and lightning scares the squirrels, Duggee teaches them about bravery.

programme.title: E34 - The Sleeping Badge
programme.desc: Tag is having trouble sleeping, so Duggee offers him a few tricks to help him.

programme.title: E33 - The Island Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels are out doing a bit of sailing. What fun! When Tag starts to feel a little bit seasick Duggee suggests a stop off at the Island for a spot of lunch, but where's all the food?

programme.title: E45 - Solar E-Glitch
programme.desc: After watching a solar eclipse, the team head into space to fix the biggest glitch yet!

programme.title: E34 - Toggle Tangle
programme.desc: After Sarah helps Scarf Lady prepare the wool for her new roof, she settles down for a dreamy sleep.

programme.title: E47 - Bug Hotel
programme.desc: Benjamin and Sophie have a new bug friend. Stanley helps build a bug feeder which attracts lots more bugs. They eat so much; Stanley gets more food and builds a Bug Hotel for them.

programme.title: E5 - I Like Tractors
programme.desc: From riding cows to having pigs in the house, the funny animals chat about everything brilliant about farms.

programme.title: E9 - Magic
programme.desc: Bluey teaches Bingo how to use magic so she can make Mum play with her, but she forgets to explain the most important rule: never use magic for cheekiness.

programme.desc: Forests are both alive and full of life. From the leafy canopy to the forest floor, animals have made these trees their home for tens of thousands of years.

programme.title: E3 - Forests
programme.desc: Forests are both alive and full of life. From the leafy canopy to the forest floor, animals have made these trees their home for tens of thousands of years.

programme.title: Baogu Produces -Deconstructing the Cold War Universe
programme.desc: Director Longman Leung is here to shed light on the mysteries of the “Cold War” series. What actually does the operation codename “Cold War” mean? Longman reveals that not a single shot had been fired in the first script while the foreshadowing in dialogue of 'Cold War' and 'Cold War 2' are going to be revealed in the sequel! Let's find out more behind-the-scenes stories of the “Cold War” series shared by Longman.

programme.title: The Battle at Lake Changjin
programme.desc: The story takes place in winter, 1950. In the freezing cold Changjin Lake region, a bloody battle between the United States and China begins. Faced with the harshest conditions of extreme cold, lack of rations and vast difference in weaponry, the Chinese troops forge ahead, fearless and determined. They successfully blow up the Shuimen Bridge, making the most critical victory in the War to Resist U.S. Aggression and Aid Korea.

programme.title: 77 Heartbreaks
programme.desc: When Adam and Eva break up after ten years, Adam thinks the breach was caused by one trivial incident, but Eva knows she's already forgiven Adam 77 times! Sweethearts since law school, Adam changed professions to start a Thai boxing studio and gradually became indifferent to Eva. Seemingly petty matters, like forgetting she hates raisin cookies, become the catalyst for her moving out and changing her Facebook status to 'single'. Despondent, Adam has a drunken tryst with his student, Mandy. Adam gains new insight after accidentally discovering Eva's private journal. Entitled '77 Heartbreaks', the title refers to the philosophy that 'forgiving someone 7 times isn't enough; 70 x 7 times is too much; so go ahead and forgive 77 times!' Reading it makes Adam realize his love. But what can he do to win her back? And what secret is contained in the journal's torn-out last page? He rushes to Eva and melts her heart by recounting their happy memories. When Eva tells him Heartbreak #77

programme.title: All The Long Nights
programme.desc: After a series of mishaps at work caused by her severe pre-menstrual syndrome, Fujisawa lands a new job at an astronomical toy factory, where she meets Yamazoe, a tacit colleague plagued by panic attacks. There the two, whose careers have been derailed by their respective conditions, learn to support and care for each other through life's ups and downs despite their initial friction.

programme.title: E5 - Panini For President
programme.desc: Panini runs in an election in Marzipan City.

programme.title: E2 - Home Part 2
programme.desc: The class decide to raise money to pay for a music teacher.

programme.title: E4 - The Devil And Li'l D
programme.desc: Li'l D dreams of signing a record deal come true.

programme.title: E10 - Colossal Coliseum Kaiseki
programme.desc: With only six chefs remaining, the challenges get even more difficult, when pastry super-chef Sherry Yard awaits the All Stars for a dreaded dessert Quickfire, made even more impossible when chefs must endure a blindfolded taste test to pick their ingredients. Then Michelin-starred Chefs/Restaurateurs Niki and Carole Lidi-Nakayama demonstrate a traditional Japanese Kaiseki meal, the ultimate in simplicity, restraint and precision. The chefs must make this formidable dinner for not just these Kaiseki masters, but in celebration of the Tokyo games with Olympic medalists Diana Taurasi, Rai Benjamin, Nastia Liukin, Ibtihaj Muhammad, Christian Coleman, Kerri Walsh Jennings and NBC Olympic Primetime Host Mike Tirico. The gold medal meal takes place at the iconic Los Angeles Coliseum with Padma, Tom, Nilou Motamed and Niki & Carole Lidi-Nakayama at the judges table.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow's trading day.

programme.title: Secret Agreements And Nazi Art
programme.desc: A look back at the secret Sykes-Picot Agreement. In 1916, France and Britain divided the Middle East between themselves, with repercussions that are still felt today. And, Nazi art: the trade with taboos.

programme.title: Born Premature - Overcoming A Difficult Start In Life
programme.desc: 15 million children are born preterm each year, not all survive. In Good Shape explores efforts to develop artificial placentas and wombs - and the ethical questions involved.

programme.title: E133
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time for transparency and trust. ABC News brings you the day's top stories and latest news, with more reporters to tell you what's going on and why it matters. Presented by Joe O'Brien.

programme.title: E2 - King Island, Tas
programme.desc: Host Anthony Burke meets a King Islander returning home to one of Australia's most remote and weatherbeaten outposts to reclaim and restore a derelict farmhouse.

programme.desc: It features two families who compete to name the most popular answers to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

Have a look at African life and find out what is going on there in the sphere of politics, health care, business. Get to know how global affairs influence its top events and be the first to experience its colorful exotic culture.

programme.title: Phoenix Evening Express
programme.desc: PHOENIX EVENING EXPRESS: Phoenix Evening Express reports world events with in-depth coverage of the latest social, economic, cultural and sports news from Mainland China, Taiwan and Hong Kong.

programme.title: E19 - Most Powerful
programme.desc: For centuries, powerful artefacts have sparked wars, inspired legends, and shaped empires. From divine weapons to sacred relics-these are the incredible stories of the world's most mighty marvels.

programme.title: E4 - Into The Eye Of The Storm
programme.desc: Jeff MacKinnon's team battles thick kelp, brutal currents, and a looming storm while searching Scatarie Island's coast. Just as the storm hits, they make a crucial discovery.

programme.title: E12 - The Finish Line
programme.desc: Lauro nears the end of the Iditarod, crossing 260 miles of ice along the Bering Sea coast to reach the finish line in Nome; Marty and his friend Dave haul supplies for a cabin into the backcountry.

E53 - Aix-Les-Bains (3)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament visits Aix-les-Bains, going to the market to meet local residents. Today, she focuses on local ceramic art and the history of the Belle Epoque Theatre-Casino.

programme.title: E5 - How To Improve Meals In Long Term Care And Accommodation Centers
programme.desc: Initiatives to enhance the nutrition of people living in long term care facilities are being implemented by those who've made it their mission. Also covered: juice pears; the best margarine; the Day of the Dead and pan de muerto in Mexico.

programme.title: E6 - Deployer Les Moyens Pour Faire Briller Tout Un Village
programme.desc: A businessman shows us around the Garneau saddle room, which he restored for the benefit of his home town. We also discover a windmill put back into use by the local community. And close-up look at a talented art carpenter.

programme.title: E20 - Surf Attitude
programme.desc: Katell's life changed dramatically at the age of 45 when a spinal cord compression left her with seriously impaired mobility and she became tetraplegic. But then she discovered sport, notably surfing, and thus began the long slow process of coming to terms with her handicap.

programme.title: E53 - Aix-Les-Bains (3)

programme.title: E5 - Ally's Farmers' Inn, The Taste Of Sharing
programme.desc: Carinne visits a unique inn in Ally, run for 50 years by ten local farming families.

programme.title: E14 - Glenat, A Grenoble Story
programme.desc: In Grenoble, Loic Ballet meets the Glenat family, founders of the famous publishing house. This true literary institution is housed in the magnificent Sainte-Cecile convent, rich in history.

programme.title: E8 - Melanie's Challenges/The Keeper Of The Keys
programme.desc: In 2006, Melanie Brugger had a terrible riding accident. She suffered a head injury and was in a coma for 27 days. When she awoke, she decided to take up mountaineering. Vincent Hammel hails from Porrentruy and nurtures a passion for his city's history.

programme.title: E14 - The Ecrins, A Passion For The Great Outdoors
programme.desc: Discover the Ecrins massif in the Hautes-Alpes. In this jewel of the mountains, known to be one of the coldest in France, ice climbing is a popular activity.

programme.title: E54 - Aix-Les-Bains (4)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament visits Aix-les-Bains, going to the market to meet local residents. Today, she focuses on Chanaz, known as the Little Venice of the Alps, and Savoyard costumes.

programme.title: E6 - Is Butchery A Disappearing Profession?
programme.desc: There is a shortage of new butchers. Nearly 10,000 butcher positions are unfilled across Canada. Why? Also covered: potassium, essential for health; food waste at festivals; rockfish (sebaste), now sold in stores.

programme.title: E5 - Aussie Ace
programme.desc: The Electra crew tests out the plane that crash landed last year by landing on an ice strip while a hotshot Australian pilot tries for a job at Buffalo.

programme.title: E6 - Rock Stars and Rampies
programme.desc: Devan threatens to punch David in mid-air, Joe blows up at his crew, the water-bombers arrive at “Iron Maiden” singer Bruce Dickinson’s hangar in Wales, and Will threatens to quit.

programme.title: E4 - This Roux's for You
programme.desc: After a late night of good times, venison chili, and some old school roux the crew heads out for another day of hunting ducks. Adaptability is critical, and after a couple of quick adjustments the team finds themselves back in the ducks.

programme.title: E7 - Frozen Planet
programme.desc: The contestants are helicoptered to the top of a glacier, where they must navigate unforgiving terrain and dangerous crevasses. With high altitudes and fewer resources, the tasks become more demanding. Divided, the four remaining teams compete for a spot in the final journey.

programme.desc: It's a food showdown between Chef Adrian Richardson's delicious yet sinful dishes and Australia's leading nutritionists' heart-friendly creations.

programme.title: E7 - Hong Hui Fang, Xiang Yun And Aileen Tan
programme.desc: Chris has invited four senior male artistes to his kitchen earlier, today he welcomes three veteran female artists Hong Hui Fang, Xiang Yun and Aileen Tan.

programme.title: E1 - Vietnam - Banh In All Forms
programme.desc: Jason soon discovers that many of Vietnam's local delicacies reflect Chinese influences,and begins to compare Banh Chang to a similar Chinese dish Zongzi.

programme.title: E1 - Vietnam - Banh In All Forms
programme.desc: Jason soon discovers that many of Vietnam's local delicacies reflect Chinese influences,and begins to compare Banh Chang to a similar Chinese dish Zongzi.

programme.desc: Jet Tila brings a taste of Japan with his hearty Sukiyaki that includes wagyu beef, shirataki noodles and a medley of vegetables.

programme.title: E5 - Singapore
programme.desc: Western cuisine chef Rathakrishnan brings us on a tour of Tekka Centre, where he frequents for Chinese, Sri Lankan and North Indian-Pakistani dishes.

programme.desc: Wang Han, Shen Meng Chen, Zhuang Yu Guang, Wu Yu Xiang and a panel of 20 judges travel to 14 cities and prefectures in the Hunan Province.

programme.title: E27
programme.desc: Hiiragi Kanade (Fukuchi Momoko) arrives in Noto as a volunteer and unexpectedly ends up launching a community radio station with the local residents. But there's no experience, no budget, and no studio - only a shared desire to bring light back to a town hurt by earthquakes and torrential rain. Once the broadcast begins, there's no turning back. A nonstop entertainment drama where ordinary citizens find themselves becoming stars.

programme.title: E34
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: E34
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: E27
programme.desc: Hiiragi Kanade (Fukuchi Momoko) arrives in Noto as a volunteer and unexpectedly ends up launching a community radio station with the local residents. But there's no experience, no budget, and no studio - only a shared desire to bring light back to a town hurt by earthquakes and torrential rain. Once the broadcast begins, there's no turning back. A nonstop entertainment drama where ordinary citizens find themselves becoming stars.

programme.title: E28
programme.desc: Curtis Stone is back and today's challenge is to combine two nations' cuisines into a tasty dish, with a standout sauce. The winning sauce will be available in Coles stores around the country.

programme.title: The Hockey Mom's Revenge
programme.desc: Former Olympic-hopeful hockey player Diane becomes obsessed with her son Alex's success. Fuelled by jealousy toward Rachel and her star son Ethan, she sabotages others to ensure Alex comes out on top.

programme.title: E28
programme.desc: Curtis Stone is back and today's challenge is to combine two nations' cuisines into a tasty dish, with a standout sauce. The winning sauce will be available in Coles stores around the country.

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: Chef Chen Zong-sheng demonstrates his delightfully deceptive dish: Carp-Shaped Giant Fried Prawns. As carp signifies fortune and prosperity, this dish is often served at weddings and celebrations.

programme.title: E64 - White Bean Soup With Albanian Snacks And Baklava
programme.desc: Rachael shows us how to spice up a charred tomato sauce and pasta dinner in two ways. In one dish she's serving the pasta over sausage and in the other she pairs the pasta with chickpeas.

programme.title: The Hockey Mom's Revenge
programme.desc: Former Olympic-hopeful hockey player Diane becomes obsessed with her son Alex's success. Fuelled by jealousy toward Rachel and her star son Ethan, she sabotages others to ensure Alex comes out on top.

programme.title: E1 - Theresa's Back
programme.desc: Theresa Caputo is back and goes global with her gift of communicating with the dead. With a tour coming up, she decides to do a reading in town before heading off, ends up getting a surprise from clients.

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: Chef Chen Zong-sheng demonstrates his delightfully deceptive dish: Carp-Shaped Giant Fried Prawns. As carp signifies fortune and prosperity, this dish is often served at weddings and celebrations.

programme.title: The Hockey Mom's Revenge
programme.desc: Former Olympic-hopeful hockey player Diane becomes obsessed with her son Alex's success. Fuelled by jealousy toward Rachel and her star son Ethan, she sabotages others to ensure Alex comes out on top.

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: Chef Chen Zong-sheng demonstrates his delightfully deceptive dish: Carp-Shaped Giant Fried Prawns. As carp signifies fortune and prosperity, this dish is often served at weddings and celebrations.

programme.title: The Hockey Mom's Revenge
programme.desc: Former Olympic-hopeful hockey player Diane becomes obsessed with her son Alex's success. Fuelled by jealousy toward Rachel and her star son Ethan, she sabotages others to ensure Alex comes out on top.

programme.title: The Hockey Mom's Revenge
programme.desc: Former Olympic-hopeful hockey player Diane becomes obsessed with her son Alex's success. Fuelled by jealousy toward Rachel and her star son Ethan, she sabotages others to ensure Alex comes out on top.

programme.title: The Hockey Mom's Revenge
programme.desc: Former Olympic-hopeful hockey player Diane becomes obsessed with her son Alex's success. Fuelled by jealousy toward Rachel and her star son Ethan, she sabotages others to ensure Alex comes out on top.

programme.title: Heron the Inventor
programme.desc: Welcome to the home of the famous engineer Heron of Alexandria! You'll be greeted by the world's first robot, and that won't be the only surprise on this tour of the premises, which are packed with absolutely astonishing inventions for such an ancient time!

programme.title: Killer Debris from Space
programme.desc: It is all around us, yet we can't see it. Space debris is orbiting our planet in increasing numbers and could pose risks to both astronauts in space and humans on earth. Join Emily Calandrelli as she explores what exactly 'space junk' is and how we track it.

programme.title: Fear of Falling
programme.desc: It's competition time for the acrobatic gymnasts, who are all heading off to the Scottish Championships. The stakes are high for both teams. But will Finn and Kirsten be able to hold their nerve and perform a clean routine?

programme.title: Math is Everywhere
programme.desc: This episode explores mathematical patterns in nature, such as the tessellating hexagonal units of a honeycomb, the bilateral symmetry of a leaf, and the radial symmetry of a snowflake and spider web. Math really is everywhere!

programme.title: The Inhabitants of Cheese
programme.desc: Cheese mites are now largely regarded as a pest, but some artisan cheeses still use them. The mites are eaten along with the cheese and many people enjoy the texture and nutty tones they produce.

programme.title: Federica the Turtle
programme.desc: Federica, the turtle, has arrived from Italy after a run-in with a container ship. Loro Parque has offered to be her ‘forever home', but how will she go sharing her new digs with others? Esmeralda, the iguana, has a lumpy belly and Jorge, the vet, is worried.

programme.title: Trip to Burkina Faso
programme.desc: In Burkina Faso, our heroes' penfriend Jamal can't wait to introduce Zoe and Milo to his parents, and like Alim, he appears to have several mums and dads. What a mystery!

programme.title: The Fog Mystery
programme.desc: Addison and Alex are filming a class-project documentary about a “typical day in Ayrton Park” – but things quickly become anything but typical when a mysterious fog envelops the entire downtown area.

programme.title: Old Luggage
programme.desc: Packed with fun DIYs, Hepi and Briko take us on an adventure!

programme.title: Giraffe - Thunderstruck
programme.desc: Giraffe is a bit skittish at the best of times. But when a lightning storm starts overhead and he's the tallest thing around his 'skittishness' hits a whole new level.

programme.title: Measuring Time
programme.desc: Back in the Middle Ages, methods for telling the time are a far cry from the ones we know today. Church bells and the position of the sun are pretty much all they've got. So inventors are constantly trying to come up with all kinds of new systems to measure time.

programme.title: Southern California
programme.desc: Southern California fun: High-flying trapeze at a popular landmark, action stunt basics at Stunt University, and a visit to a water-conserving farm. A week of thrilling adventures with Nicole and local teens in the sunny state!

programme.title: Making Electricity
programme.desc: The power goes out just as Smorph is busting his best moves, meaning it's time to find out how electricity is made and to get the party going again.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... A Microscope
programme.desc: Henry meets a friendly Microscope. He has just discovered the cure for smelly burps.

programme.title: My Fair Fico
programme.desc: Team Doki is invited to a dinner party at a palace in Denmark. They're excited to be going to such a fancy affair. Anabella and Gabi worry that Fico might embarrass them with his poor table manners! Doki doesn't think it's a big deal. What are manners for, anyway?

programme.title: Zoe Tomas Creole: Bird Trainer Superstar
programme.desc: Zoe Tomas and her chicken Creole hold the GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS title for the fastest time to complete an agility course by a chicken. Zoe meets Emma Salt and teaches her the basics of training Creole, the chicken, sharing why she became a chicken trainer.

programme.title: Vets On Duty
programme.desc: The Junior Vets check out some lovely lemurs, get up close with Fluffy, the python, and meet a vulture called Derek! Plus, some cute little piglets need help, and Johnny and Inel meet a singing dog.

programme.title: Why Are Plants So Green?
programme.desc: The chlorophyll in plants takes in energy from sunlight. It absorbs colours like red and blue, but reflects the green wavelengths back to us. This process makes plants look green to our eyes.

programme.title: The Fog Mystery
programme.desc: Addison and Alex are filming a class-project documentary about a “typical day in Ayrton Park” – but things quickly become anything but typical when a mysterious fog envelops the entire downtown area.

programme.title: Old Luggage
programme.desc: Packed with fun DIYs, Hepi and Briko take us on an adventure!

programme.title: The Inhabitants of Cheese
programme.desc: Cheese mites are now largely regarded as a pest, but some artisan cheeses still use them. The mites are eaten along with the cheese and many people enjoy the texture and nutty tones they produce.

programme.desc: A man shoots four people in broad daylight, leaving Tulsa detectives, attorneys, and everyone impacted struggling to explain his mental state.

programme.title: Beyond The Headlines: Black Girl Missing
programme.desc: Companion piece to the movie Black Girl Missing. While the media goes into a frenzy over missing white girls, Black women's disappearances receive muted coverage and limited police resources.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: Jabariya Jodi
programme.desc: Abhay kidnaps greedy grooms who demand dowry and forces them into reform, but when his childhood love Babli returns, his mission and heart begin to change. Release Year: 2019 Director: Prashant Singh

programme.title: E1 - Learning to Do the Right Thing!
programme.desc: Join Buster as he learns to do the right thing! When Buster accidentally breaks the class flower, he panics & tries to cover it up, but soon learns that telling the truth is always the best thing to do. Then, when he & Daddy spot a steam train speeding out of control, they know they have to do the right thing! They race after the train & save the day! From cleaning up his toys to helping a puppy, Buster is always trying to do the right thing.

programme.title: E2 - A Big Day of Games & Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of discovery & play with Twinkle & her friends! The fun starts as they learn to play new musical instruments, with Twinkle on drums, Kitty on the sax & Bunny on guitar! Then, it's time to play a fun game of 'Twinkle Says'! Follow along as they give you playful instructions & see if you can keep up. The discoveries continue as the friends find a mirror & make funny faces & wonder what an umbrella is for before it starts to rain!

programme.title: E4 - A Magical Sky Adventure!
programme.desc: Go on a magical sky adventure with Twinkle! First, discover the variety of cloud shapes & sizes, from triangles & squares to star-shaped clouds! Then, daydream high in the clouds with Twinkle & Mr. Moon, where her magical stardust makes the moon sneeze & keeps changing colors! The sky-high fun continues as Twinkle soars through the sky on a magical journey to explore all the vibrant colors of the rainbow.

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! When all the contents of Tucker's bag fall out from a hole in his backpack, Stanley & Grub help him fix it so he can get to school. Then, when Grub can't get to sleep because she's afraid of the dark, Stanley has a clever idea to make a 'star' night light from a glove that floated down. From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.title: E1 - A Day of Food, Play & Learning!
programme.desc: Join the kids for a day of food, play & learning! First, Grandma Panda bakes some cupcakes while Mia & Bari role-play as bakers in their own pretend kitchen & play a game of pat-a-cake. Then, it's time for a teddy bear's picnic with a whole variety of different tasty treats! The learning continues as Daddy & Twinkle show Max how to say hello with a wave before going into town to wave hello to all their friends. It's a fun-filled, yummy day!

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! When all the contents of Tucker's bag fall out from a hole in his backpack, Stanley & Grub help him fix it so he can get to school. Then, when Grub can't get to sleep because she's afraid of the dark, Stanley has a clever idea to make a 'star' night light from a glove that floated down. From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super fun underwater sing-along with The Sharksons! Join the fun as five little reef sharks learn their lesson about jumping on the bed. Then, meet an 'Itsy Bitsy' sea spider who keeps trying to climb an underwater cliff with a little help from her friends! The classic rhymes continue with a curious crab acting out the story of Humpty Dumpty & a cozy pajama party with ten friends in a bed. It's a sing-along full of classic tunes with a fun, fishy twist!

programme.title: E1 - Twinkle's Most Magical Moments!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle the star for her most magical moments! When Max, Muffin & Bao Bao build a toy train, Twinkle transforms into a real train & takes the kids on a ride all around the house! Then, when Max pretends he's a wizard, Twinkle turns into a magic wand to make his magic real! Her powers continue as she brings fruits & veggies to life for a puppet show & turns into a giant wibbly-wobbly jelly for everyone to play on! It's always magical with Twinkle!

programme.title: E1 - Twinkle's Most Magical Moments!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle the star for her most magical moments! When Max, Muffin & Bao Bao build a toy train, Twinkle transforms into a real train & takes the kids on a ride all around the house! Then, when Max pretends he's a wizard, Twinkle turns into a magic wand to make his magic real! Her powers continue as she brings fruits & veggies to life for a puppet show & turns into a giant wibbly-wobbly jelly for everyone to play on! It's always magical with Twinkle!

programme.title: E16 - JJ's Fun Day of Sports & Play!
programme.desc: Get ready for a fun day of sports & play with JJ! He discovers the fun of putting on shoes & sliding at the playground. Then, sing 'Head, Shoulders, Knees and Toes' while learning body parts! The active fun continues with a competitive soccer match against animal friends & a team sports day at the field. Plus, learn swimming skills on a hot day & go on an exciting ski trip with Ms. Appleberry & the class!

programme.title: E1 - An Ultimate Animal Adventure!
programme.desc: Blippi is wondering about animals on an ultimate adventure! Join Blippi & his robot friend FETCH as they travel the world to get their questions answered. How high can a kangaroo jump? Blippi finds out in a hopping race in Australia! How do bats see in the dark? A new bat friend shows him all about echolocation! The adventure continues as he learns why squirrels bury nuts & how ducks float. Blippi & FETCH also help their new friends, like when they work together to rebuild a blue jay's nest!

programme.title: E6 - Let's Learn to Be Healthy!
programme.desc: Let's learn how to be healthy with Baby John! He learns all about the bones that make up his body when he visits the doctor & his friend 'Mr. Skeleton'! Then, after tripping & falling while playing soccer, Baby John learns the tough task of tying his own shoelaces! The health lessons continue as Mom & Dad teach him how to properly sneeze into his arm to keep everyone around him from getting sick.

programme.title: E1 - Squirrel Trouble & Other Wacky Problems!
programme.desc: Arpo is dealing with squirrel trouble & other wacky problems! That pesky squirrel is always trying to steal food or run off with Baby Daniel's teddy bear. But the wacky problems don't stop there! When a ghost crashes playtime, Arpo has to use all his tech to bust it. Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire, like when a toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably & when Baby Daniel accidentally terrorizes him with a magnet. It's a day of very wacky problems!

programme.title: E2 - When Friends Need a Hero!
programme.desc: Sometimes friends need a hero, & Buster is always ready to help! When he gets caught in a scary storm, he rushes to shelter, but then he spots his friend Scout, stuck in a muddy puddle! Buster has to muster all his courage to go back out & rescue her. But sometimes, even heroes need help! On another day, Buster gets stuck in the mud himself & has to be towed out by Terry Tractor. From stopping a runaway train to standing up to a bully, Buster is always there for his friends.

programme.title: E3 - Learning, Growing & Having Fun!
programme.desc: Buster is learning, growing & having fun! First, he gets covered in mud & needs to get clean, but he's frightened by the big, noisy carwash! He has to work up the courage to try it himself. Then, after eating too many sweets, Buster gets a sore tooth & Amber the Ambulance teaches him the importance of keeping his teeth clean. In a race against Terry Tractor, Buster also learns that slow & steady can sometimes win the race!

programme.title: E4 - A Magical Sky Adventure!
programme.desc: Go on a magical sky adventure with Twinkle! First, discover the variety of cloud shapes & sizes, from triangles & squares to star-shaped clouds! Then, daydream high in the clouds with Twinkle & Mr. Moon, where her magical stardust makes the moon sneeze & keeps changing colors! The sky-high fun continues as Twinkle soars through the sky on a magical journey to explore all the vibrant colors of the rainbow.

programme.title: E3 - Gentle Lessons & Bedtime
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some gentle lessons & soothing bedtime songs. First, Twinkle learns about the importance of eating healthy, delicious fruit, like bananas, oranges & grapes. Then, help her find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make! After a long day of learning, it's time to get ready for bed. Listen as Twinkle & Mr. Moon sing a soothing nighttime lullaby to help you relax & drift off to sleep.

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! When all the contents of Tucker's bag fall out from a hole in his backpack, Stanley & Grub help him fix it so he can get to school. Then, when Grub can't get to sleep because she's afraid of the dark, Stanley has a clever idea to make a 'star' night light from a glove that floated down. From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.title: E4 - Sun, Moon, Stars
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super fun underwater sing-along with The Sharksons! Join the fun as five little reef sharks learn their lesson about jumping on the bed. Then, meet an 'Itsy Bitsy' sea spider who keeps trying to climb an underwater cliff with a little help from her friends! The classic rhymes continue with a curious crab acting out the story of Humpty Dumpty & a cozy pajama party with ten friends in a bed. It's a sing-along full of classic tunes with a fun, fishy twist!

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! programme.title: E1 - Twinkle's Most Magical Moments!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle the star for her most magical moments! When Max, Muffin & Bao Bao build a toy train, Twinkle transforms into a real train & takes the kids on a ride all around the house! Then, when Max pretends he's a wizard, Twinkle turns into a magic wand to make his magic real! Her powers continue as she brings fruits & veggies to life for a puppet show & turns into a giant wibbly-wobbly jelly for everyone to play on! It's always magical with Twinkle!

programme.title: E1 - A Day of Food, Play & Learning!
programme.desc: Join the kids for a day of food, play & learning! First, Grandma Panda bakes some cupcakes while Mia & Bari role-play as bakers in their own pretend kitchen & play a game of pat-a-cake. Then, it's time for a teddy bear's picnic with a whole variety of different tasty treats! The learning continues as Daddy & Twinkle show Max how to say hello with a wave before going into town to wave hello to all their friends. It's a fun-filled, yummy day!

programme.title: E2 - A Big Day of Games & Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of discovery & play with Twinkle & her friends! The fun starts as they learn to play new musical instruments, with Twinkle on drums, Kitty on the sax & Bunny on guitar! Then, it's time to play a fun game of 'Twinkle Says'! Follow along as they give you playful instructions & see if you can keep up. The discoveries continue as the friends find a mirror & make funny faces & wonder what an umbrella is for before it starts to rain!

programme.title: E16 - JJ's Fun Day of Sports & Play!
programme.desc: Get ready for a fun day of sports & play with JJ! He discovers the fun of putting on shoes & sliding at the playground. Then, sing 'Head, Shoulders, Knees and Toes' while learning body parts! The active fun continues with a competitive soccer match against animal friends & a team sports day at the field. Plus, learn swimming skills on a hot day & go on an exciting ski trip with Ms. Appleberry & the class!

programme.title: E1 - Learning to Do the Right Thing!
programme.desc: Join Buster as he learns to do the right thing! When Buster accidentally breaks the class flower, he panics & tries to cover it up, but soon learns that telling the truth is always the best thing to do. Then, when he & Daddy spot a steam train speeding out of control, they know they have to do the right thing! They race after the train & save the day! From cleaning up his toys to helping a puppy, Buster is always trying to do the right thing.

programme.title: E204 - Lay Lay's Beauty Shop Day Day
programme.desc: It's Lay Lay and Sadie's first-time accompanying Trish to her standing appointment at the Beauty Shop. When Lay Lay starts spilling all the tea, she and Sadie are left with a big mess to clean up in order to get Trish un-banned from the salon.

programme.title: E115 - Host-a-Palooza
programme.desc: Patrick gets injured, so his family members take turns hosting the show.

programme.title: E104 - Houbi Houba Heist / Twister's Treehouse
programme.desc: Mica's Marsup journal ends up in Acu's bag so he has to get it back before his friend finds it. // Twister, is fed up of Hope and Punch's pranks, so he builds his own cardboard house which Stan finds.

programme.title: E207 - Fami-Lay-Lay Reunion
programme.desc: The family is hosting Bryce's relatives for the annual Alexander family reunion. Sadie is finally old enough to help in the kitchen. Lay Lay is convinced that a friend of the family's named Ray Ray is an avatar, just like her.

programme.title: E301 - A Fiñata Full Of Death Bugs
programme.desc: When a dangerous piñata ends up at a kid’s birthday party, Kid Danger and Captain Man must go undercover and step in before it’s too late.

programme.title: E105 - Rock-a-Bye Besty / Shake or Break
programme.desc: Best is too anxious to sleep, but Bester knows what to do. He needs to count sheep! Or count one sheep to be exact. // The twins help Flip Flop with her milkshake deliveries, but find one very difficult customer impossible to satisfy.

programme.title: E413 - Terror on Tape
programme.desc: The Stars watch a series of haunted video tapes.

programme.title: E126 - Jasper's Real Girlfriend
programme.desc: Jasper’s summer camp girlfriend comes to town staying with Charlotte. She quickly becomes jealous thinking Charlotte is in love with Jasper. Charlotte begins to question the girl's sanity.

programme.title: E422 - A Star is Scorned / Senior Moment
programme.desc: Lori regrets everything she hasn't done in high school, and vows to make up for lost time in her senior year. // When Lola realizes that double the cuteness could help her break into show business, she teams up with Lily.

programme.title: E525 - High Crimes
programme.desc: Sunset Canyon is falling apart and Lincoln and Clyde High Crimes are determined to find out why... David Steele style.

programme.title: E807 - Europe Road Trip: A Bite of Transylvania / Europe Road Trip: Greece is the Word
programme.desc: When the Louds' bus gets a flat tire, they're invited to stay the night in a spooky couple's mysterious castle. // During a tour of the Parthenon, Lincoln puts on a soldier's helmet which sends him back to Ancient Greece.

programme.title: E104 - Houbi Houba Heist / Twister's Treehouse
programme.desc: Mica's Marsup journal ends up in Acu's bag so he has to get it back before his friend finds it. // Twister, is fed up of Hope and Punch's pranks, so he builds his own cardboard house which Stan finds.

programme.title: E220 - Yes Man / Friend or Faux
programme.desc: The sisters enlist the 'Master of Convincing' (AKA Lincoln) to teach them how to ask Mom and Dad for money. // Lisa gets her report card and finds she's failed 'social skills'. To bring up her grade, she must make a friend.

programme.title: E103 - Driving Miss Hazy / No Guts, No Glori
programme.desc: Tired of doing favors to get a ride from Lori, Lincoln decides it's time to help Leni pass her driver's test. // Lincoln conspires with the rest of his sisters to overthrow Lori's tyranny as their 'baby'sitter.

programme.title: E5 - Fool's Gold
programme.desc: Musical comedy star Sally Ann Howes plays a dramatic role as a guest member of the IMF when it sets out to foil a plot to ruin a friendly country with counterfeit money.

programme.title: E2 - Part 2
programme.desc: Though Bonnie Parker and Clyde Barrow's crime spree is legendary, their story has never been told quite like this. Fueled by their passion for each other and Bonnie's obsession with fame, the couple committed increasingly dangerous robberies, leaving a trail of blood - and headlines - behind them. Aided by Clyde's sixth sense, they stayed one step ahead of the law until their final, fateful showdown.

programme.title: E3 - Crate 'N Burial
programme.desc: Grissom, Nick, and Sara search for a kidnapped woman and find more than they expected. Catherine and Warrick investigate the hit and run death of a little girl.

programme.title: E23 - Delinquent
programme.desc: When a young woman finds a teenage boy asleep and naked in her bedroom, his mother is quick to defend him. While Benson and Stabler try to figure out what truly happened, they also have to manage the duo.

programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: 講述失去笑容的朝鮮王世子，擁有冷峻氣質與壓倒性的氣場，背負着喪失摯愛與朝廷鬥爭的傷痛。以及樂觀開朗的女攤販，雖然失去部分過去記憶，仍堅強面對生活。在某日二人意外靈魂互換，進而展開對自身與他人命運的重新審視，並因靈魂互換而展開浪漫奇幻愛情故事。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 二百年後兩個神祕的女人，突然出現在超級富有的丹氏家族，沒人知道她們是誰。但隨後這兩位女子意識到，在前世她們與丹氏家族的每位成員，都有着密不可分的關係。

programme.title: E2 - Yukon Wild
programme.desc: The Yukon is a true wilderness, one of the last on Earth. The vast land got its name from its longest river, which the Gwich’in, one of the indigenous people of the region, call 'Yu-kun- ah', or, the 'great river'. The third longest waterway in North America, the Yukon River flows through wide open valleys and narrow channels over 3,000 km Northwest towards the storm tossed Bering Sea.

programme.title: E6 - Changing Tides
programme.desc: Bundle up as Lizzie heads north to tag sharks and witness first-hand the slow, sobering disappearance of sea ice. Do time in bear jail with polar bears who are caught raiding a town for food after their icy hunting grounds diminish.

programme.title: E1 - Baby Sea Otter Finds a Family
programme.desc: Join the vet and his team in saving a massive sea lion caught in a plastic noose, and then visit the Rescue Center, where a harbor seal pup may lose its eyesight and a baby sea otter needs a risky but life-saving surgery.

E3 - 拆解職場核心競爭力
programme.desc: 打破傳統求職單向選擇的邏輯，從企業「滅燈挑錯」的評判模式，升級為發掘求職者自身閃光點的賦能模式。企業面試官可以隨時爆燈拋出橄欖枝，同步明確崗位與薪酬待遇，大幅拓寬求職者的選擇空間，讓雙向匹配更高效、更真誠。

programme.title: E7 - 在你心裡我是誰
programme.desc: 由張純燁、伊能靜、張繼科、朱正廷、宋雨琦、姜振宇等人組成的「戀愛觀察團」，8位年輕男女於雲南大理「浪漫滿屋」合宿一個月，開啟同一屋簷下的合租模式，並於其中彼此之間出現的信號進行推理愛情。

programme.title: E3 - 拆解職場核心競爭力
programme.desc: 打破傳統求職單向選擇的邏輯，從企業「滅燈挑錯」的評判模式，升級為發掘求職者自身閃光點的賦能模式。企業面試官可以隨時爆燈拋出橄欖枝，同步明確崗位與薪酬待遇，大幅拓寬求職者的選擇空間，讓雙向匹配更高效、更真誠。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E2 - 美食研習小隊拜師學廚
programme.desc: 由李晨、吳尊、何超蓮、劉維作常駐嘉賓，帶領觀眾走進阿根廷、新西蘭、泰國、冰島、土耳其、愛爾蘭等國家駐華大使館，探秘各地文化密碼，復刻地道異國風味，並結合中國特色美食文化打造中外融合料理，開啟以食會友、賓至如歸的文化交流真人秀。

programme.title: E3 - 拆解職場核心競爭力
programme.desc: 打破傳統求職單向選擇的邏輯，從企業「滅燈挑錯」的評判模式，升級為發掘求職者自身閃光點的賦能模式。企業面試官可以隨時爆燈拋出橄欖枝，同步明確崗位與薪酬待遇，大幅拓寬求職者的選擇空間，讓雙向匹配更高效、更真誠。

programme.title: Haathi Mere Saathi
programme.desc: Raju performs at the streets in the company of four elephants. He gets married and is told to make a choice between his animal friends or his family. Release Year: 2021 Director: Prabhu Solomon
